subcodes.first_line: A leaf from God unto the leaf who hath clung to this ancient Root and hearkened unto the Call when it was raised in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقه من الله الی الورقه التی تمسکت بهذا الاصل القدیم و سمعت الندآء اذ ارتفع بالحق و
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love of God
